what_it_does: Records a channel attachment metadata entry that associates the dragnet-development channel with board item item-9645a809 as a board_items attachment.
observations: Attachment metadata is stored as a Markdown file with YAML frontmatter
Target uses a board:// URI scheme referencing item-9645a809
No narrative content exists beyond the frontmatter fields
Timestamp is recorded in ISO 8601 format with timezone offset
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields
Markdown file extension for a metadata-only record
URI-style target reference for cross-artifact linking
concerns: No descriptive title or human-readable label for the attachment
No author or source message identifier
Target board item cannot be resolved from this file alone
notes: A sparse channel-attachment metadata stub pointing to a board item in dragnet-development.
questions: What specific message or content in dragnet-development does this attachment belong to?
What is the nature or content of board item item-9645a809?
Is the target board item expected to exist within the same project?
apparent_themes: linking channel artifacts to board items
intention_signals: Capture the fact that a board item (item-9645a809) is attached to the dragnet-development channel as a board_items type, likely for traceability between channel memory and board artifacts.
novelty: The attachment record contains no payload or body—only a typed link to an external board item.
contribution: A persistent, timestamped link between a channel and a board item, enabling cross-artifact traceability without embedding the board content.
summary_for_embedding: A channel attachment metadata file for dragnet-development of type board_items targeting board item item-9645a809, created on 2026-06-23.
intention_for_embedding: To record that a board item is attached to the dragnet-development channel for later lookup and cross-reference.
